title: Influenza (Flu) Information for Health Care Providers | Influenza (Flu) | CDC
text:
commendations for health care professionals. 
Vaccine Product Information 
Information for health care providers about vaccine supply and distribution. 
Clinical Testing and Diagnosis 
Influenza testing is recommended for all patients with suspected flu who are admitted to hospital. 
About Influenza Antiviral Medications 
Antiviral medications are an important adjunct to influenza vaccine in the control of influenza. 
Infection Control Guidance 
Educational documents for infection control in health care facilities. 
Laboratory Testing 
Laboratory diagnosis of influenza, including guidance for clinicians. 
Influenza (Flu) 
Influenza (flu) is a contagious respiratory illness caused by influenza viruses that infect the nose, throat, and lungs.
